reviews.review_msg: Megan is such an inspirational baddie feminist, scholar, and professor! We all love her. Her classes are engaging and she helps  She is a bit of a hard marker (very hard to get an A+), but she's also very fair and willing to re-mark if you request it. She offers students so many opportunities to support us in many ways. Her stories are also epic.

Megan is amazing. She is so sweet super approachable and genuinely cares about her students even in a class with 200 people. Marks quite hard on the briefing paper but quizzes are easy as long as you review lectures. A lot of reading but majority of them are quite interesting. Overall would definitely recommend any classes with her she is awesome.
